title: Bounded RGE operator loop runner
problem: The human operator still coordinates every loop step manually despite deterministic golden gates, safety audit checks, live smoke gating, improvement-ticket promotion review, and principal audit checkpoints. Gates exist but no mock-only operator loop runner inspects repo state and recommends or executes the next safe step.
acceptance_criteria: python -m rge.modules.operator_loop --mode plan outputs machine-readable JSON with ticket state, audit cadence, next action, gate classification, and commands.
python -m rge.modules.operator_loop --mode execute-safe runs only allowlisted mock-only checks when working tree is clean.
Operator loop never merges, pushes, promotes tickets, edits TICKET_QUEUE.md, enables live LLM, or runs live smoke.
Unit tests cover next-ticket-ready, audit-overdue, pre-audit-required, pending improvement ticket, safe-check pass, and dirty-tree blocked cases.
Operating docs describe plan → execute-safe → approve review-gated as default operator workflow.
Operator loop reports blocked on documentation-ahead-of-git drift: branch mismatch, report mismatch, done-without-commit, or multi-ticket dirty tree.
non_goals: Do not merge to main or push from the operator loop.
Do not auto-promote improvement tickets or edit TICKET_QUEUE.md.
Do not enable live LLM mode or run live smoke tests.
Do not implement ticket-042 deployment docs in this ticket.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket-041 branch and remove operator_loop module.
